---
title: "Serif Theme"
subtitle: "Traditional and readable"
author: Demo
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: serif
    slide-number: true
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    embed-resources: true
    transition: none
---

## Classic serif typography

This theme uses **serif fonts** on a warm background — familiar and professional, like a well-typeset document.

- Great for text-heavy presentations
- Feels more "academic" than sans-serif themes
- Easy to read at a distance

## Callout boxes

::: {.callout-tip}
## Key takeaway
Callout boxes draw the eye to the most important points on a slide. Use them sparingly.
:::

::: {.callout-note}
## For reference
You can include links, formatted text, and even code inside callout boxes.
:::

## Data presentation

| Tool | Type | Monthly Cost | Best For |
|------|------|-------------|----------|
| Claude | Chat + Terminal | Free – $100 | Research, writing, code |
| ChatGPT | Chat + Desktop | Free – $20 | Quick questions, brainstorming |
| Copilot | Chat (UVM) | Free | Sensitive data |

Serif fonts make tables particularly readable.
